articles.title: OpenAI自研芯片Jalapeño发布：天下苦英伟达久矣，推理芯片战争开打
articles.title_en: OpenAI Jalapeño Chip Launch: The War on NVIDIA Dominance Begins
articles.summary: OpenAI正式发布首颗自研AI芯片Jalapeño，与博通合作9个月完成，专为推理设计。天下苦英伟达久矣，谷歌TPU、亚马逊Trainium、微软Maia、自研芯片浪潮全面袭来。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI officially launches first self-developed AI chip Jalapeño with Broadcom in 9 months, inference-only design. Everyone suffers from NVIDIA dominance, Google TPU Amazon Trainium Microsoft Maia self-developed chip wave arrives.

hero.title: OpenAI发布首颗自研芯片Jalapeño：推理专用，与博通9个月完成，年底规模部署
hero.title_en: OpenAI Launches First Custom Chip Jalapeño: Inference-Only, Built with Broadcom in 9 Months
